name: 4-Bit Binary Adder
description: Build a 4-bit binary adder circuit that adds two 4-bit numbers. Use four full adder circuits in series. Each full adder takes two input bits and a carry-in, producing a sum bit and carry-out. The circuit should have 8 input levers (4 bits for each number) and 5 output lamps (4 sum bits + final carry).
hints: Each full adder needs: 2 XOR gates, 2 AND gates, 1 OR gate
XOR can be built with: 2 comparators in subtract mode or complex torch arrangement
Connect carry-out of each stage to carry-in of next stage
Use repeaters to maintain signal strength across long distances
Layout: arrange 4 full adders horizontally, inputs on left, outputs on right

test_cases: Input A=0001, B=0001 → Output=00010 (2 in binary)
Input A=0111, B=0001 → Output=1000 (8 in binary)
Input A=1111, B=1111 → Output=11110 (30 in binary, with carry)
verification.notes: Verify each full adder produces correct sum and carry
